subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Sovereign of the Kingdom of eternity and Lord of the Last and the First! I beseech Thee by the mysteries of Thy celestial Dominion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا مالک ملکوت البقاء و سلطان الاخره و الاولی اسئلک باسرار جبروتک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @rejection, opposition and persecution
